Title: TC-P01: Create single Pantry ticket via Green button
Steps: 1. Log in to the Cp system as a valid Cp user. | 2. Navigate to the main dashboard or the page displaying the 'Green' and 'Brown' buttons. | 3. Click the 'Green' button once. | 4. Navigate to the Pantry Department ticket list/view.
Expected Result: One new ticket is successfully created and displayed in the Pantry Department ticket list.

Title: TC-P02: Create single General ticket via Brown button
Steps: 1. Log in to the Cp system as a valid Cp user. | 2. Navigate to the main dashboard or the page displaying the 'Green' and 'Brown' buttons. | 3. Click the 'Brown' button once. | 4. Navigate to the General Department ticket list/view.
Expected Result: One new ticket is successfully created and displayed in the General Department ticket list.

Title: TC-P03: Create multiple Pantry tickets via Green button
Steps: 1. Log in to the Cp system as a valid Cp user. | 2. Navigate to the page displaying the 'Green' and 'Brown' buttons. | 3. Click the 'Green' button two times consecutively. | 4. Navigate to the Pantry Department ticket list/view.
Expected Result: Two new tickets are successfully created and displayed in the Pantry Department ticket list.

Title: TC-P04: Create multiple General tickets via Brown button
Steps: 1. Log in to the Cp system as a valid Cp user. | 2. Navigate to the page displaying the 'Green' and 'Brown' buttons. | 3. Click the 'Brown' button three times consecutively. | 4. Navigate to the General Department ticket list/view.
Expected Result: Three new tickets are successfully created and displayed in the General Department ticket list.

Title: TC-P05: Create mixed department tickets using both buttons
Steps: 1. Log in to the Cp system as a valid Cp user. | 2. Navigate to the page displaying the 'Green' and 'Brown' buttons. | 3. Click the 'Green' button once. | 4. Click the 'Brown' button once. | 5. Navigate to both the Pantry Department and General Department ticket views.
Expected Result: One new ticket is successfully created in the Pantry Department, AND one new ticket is successfully created in the General Department.

Title: TC-P06: Verify default attributes for a Pantry ticket
Steps: 1. Log in to the Cp system as a valid Cp user. | 2. Click the 'Green' button. | 3. Navigate to the Pantry Department ticket list and open the newly created ticket.
Expected Result: The new ticket in the Pantry Department has expected default attributes such as 'New' status, 'Cp user' as creator, and 'Pantry' as the assigned department.

Title: TC-P07: Verify default attributes for a General ticket
Steps: 1. Log in to the Cp system as a valid Cp user. | 2. Click the 'Brown' button. | 3. Navigate to the General Department ticket list and open the newly created ticket.
Expected Result: The new ticket in the General Department has expected default attributes such as 'New' status, 'Cp user' as creator, and 'General' as the assigned department.

Title: TC-N01: Attempt ticket creation when unauthenticated
Steps: 1. Ensure no user is logged in to the Cp system. | 2. Attempt to navigate to the page where the 'Green' and 'Brown' buttons are located. | 3. If buttons are visible, click the 'Green' button.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the login page, OR an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Please log in to perform this action'), OR the buttons are disabled/not visible.

Title: TC-N02: Backend service failure during Pantry ticket creation
Steps: 1. Log in to the Cp system as a valid Cp user. | 2. Simulate a backend error (e.g., database connection issue, server timeout) for ticket creation. | 3. Click the 'Green' button.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message is displayed to the user (e.g., 'Failed to create ticket. Please try again later.'), and no ticket is created in the Pantry Department.

Title: TC-N03: Rapid multiple clicks on Green button (stress test)
Steps: 1. Log in to the Cp system as a valid Cp user. | 2. Rapidly click the 'Green' button 10 times within a short duration (e.g., 2 seconds). | 3. Navigate to the Pantry Department ticket list/view.
Expected Result: The system should gracefully handle the rapid clicks, either by creating a reasonable number of tickets (e.g., 1-2 to prevent spamming), displaying a rate-limiting message, or creating all 10 tickets without a system crash or data corruption.

Title: TC-N04: Rapid multiple clicks on Brown button (stress test)
Steps: 1. Log in to the Cp system as a valid Cp user. | 2. Rapidly click the 'Brown' button 10 times within a short duration (e.g., 2 seconds). | 3. Navigate to the General Department ticket list/view.
Expected Result: The system should gracefully handle the rapid clicks, either by creating a reasonable number of tickets (e.g., 1-2 to prevent spamming), displaying a rate-limiting message, or creating all 10 tickets without a system crash or data corruption.

Title: TC-N05: Department configuration missing for Pantry
Steps: 1. Log in to the Cp system as an administrator and temporarily de-configure or remove the 'Pantry Department' from the system's available departments. | 2. Log in as a Cp user. | 3. Click the 'Green' button.
Expected Result: An error message indicating the department is invalid or missing is displayed (e.g., 'Target department not found'), and no ticket is created or the ticket is routed to a default 'unassigned' department if fallback exists.
